planned_ablation_tests.expected_if_vf_h2_specific: effect size decreases substantially or becomes non-positive
planned_ablation_tests.failure_signal: effect remains strongly positive without persistent memory ledger
planned_ablation_tests.name: remove_persistent_memory_ledger
planned_ablation_tests.purpose: Check whether the positive ledger_effect_size collapses when persistent ledger memory is removed.

planned_ablation_tests.expected_if_vf_h2_specific: effect size decreases under shuffled ledger history
planned_ablation_tests.failure_signal: effect remains unchanged after ledger history shuffle
planned_ablation_tests.name: shuffle_ledger_history
planned_ablation_tests.purpose: Check whether temporal ordering of ledger history matters.

planned_ablation_tests.expected_if_vf_h2_specific: effect size weakens under randomized gates
planned_ablation_tests.failure_signal: effect remains strongly positive under randomized gates
planned_ablation_tests.name: randomize_symbolic_gate
planned_ablation_tests.purpose: Check whether signal depends on structured symbolic gates rather than arbitrary scoring.

planned_ablation_tests.expected_if_vf_h2_specific: memory-ledger condition remains positive against strengthened null
planned_ablation_tests.failure_signal: strengthened null closes or reverses the effect
planned_ablation_tests.name: strengthened_null_control
planned_ablation_tests.purpose: Compare against a stronger abstract null that allows same-step duplicate structure but no persistent memory.

planned_ablation_tests.expected_if_vf_h2_specific: positive effect remains above preregistered threshold across seed permutations
planned_ablation_tests.name: seed_permutation_stability
planned_ablation_tests.purpose: Check whether the result is overfit to deterministic seed layout.

planned_ablation_tests.expected_if_vf_h2_specific: no single score component fully explains the result
planned_ablation_tests.failure_signal: one component alone recreates the full positive effect
planned_ablation_tests.name: score_component_ablation
planned_ablation_tests.purpose: Check whether one scoring component alone forces the result.

planned_artifact_resistance_tests.fail_rule: constant or near-constant effect sizes detected
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.name: constant_effect_guard
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.pass_rule: effect sizes vary across parameter grid and are not near-constant
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.purpose: Flag constant or near-constant effect sizes.

planned_artifact_resistance_tests.fail_rule: support is concentrated in one narrow parameter subgroup
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.name: parameter_subgroup_consistency
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.pass_rule: positive support appears in every preregistered subgroup family
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.purpose: Check whether support appears across node_count, packet_count, and step_count subgroups.

planned_artifact_resistance_tests.name: null_leak_guard
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.purpose: Detect whether null controls accidentally encode memory-ledger behavior.

planned_artifact_resistance_tests.fail_rule: mean positive but median or lower quartile non-positive
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.name: effect_size_distribution_guard
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.pass_rule: positive median and positive lower-quartile effect size
planned_artifact_resistance_tests.purpose: Check whether mean support hides unstable or bimodal effects.

preregistered_success_rules.ablation_specificity_rule: at least four of six ablation tests must weaken the effect in the expected direction
preregistered_success_rules.artifact_guard_rule: no constant-effect artifact and zero null-control leaks
preregistered_success_rules.interpretation_if_failed: current VF-H2 support may be toy-artifact dependent and claims must be reduced
preregistered_success_rules.interpretation_if_passed: artifact-resistant internal toy support only, not theory validation
preregistered_success_rules.strengthened_null_rule: memory-ledger condition must remain positive against strengthened null

reason_for_tests: The preregistered larger safe toy robustness check produced strong internal toy support.
The next risk is that the signal may be an artifact of toy construction, scoring, seeds, or weak null controls.
Artifact-resistance and ablation tests are required before any stronger internal claim can be considered.
